# Get the most out of schmux: optional dependencies

schmux auto-detects these tools and enables features when present. Install tracks cover macOS and Linux/WSL2 (WSL2 is how Windows is supported).

## AI agents

Coding agents schmux orchestrates.

### antigravity

Google's Antigravity (agy) terminal coding agent.

Unlocks:

- Run Antigravity (agy) agents + runtime model discovery

**Install (macOS):**

- Install script: `curl -fsSL https://antigravity.google/cli/install.sh | bash`

**Install (Linux / WSL2):**

- Install script: `curl -fsSL https://antigravity.google/cli/install.sh | bash`

[Learn more](https://antigravity.google)

### claude

Anthropic's Claude Code CLI agent.

Unlocks:

- Run Claude Code agents (interactive and one-shot)

**Install (macOS):**

- Homebrew: `brew install --cask claude-code`
- npm: `npm i -g @anthropic-ai/claude-code`

**Install (Linux / WSL2):**

- npm: `npm i -g @anthropic-ai/claude-code`

[Learn more](https://docs.claude.com/claude-code)

### codex

OpenAI's Codex CLI coding agent.

Unlocks:

- Run OpenAI Codex agents (interactive and one-shot)

**Install (macOS):**

- npm: `npm i -g @openai/codex`
- Homebrew: `brew install codex`

**Install (Linux / WSL2):**

- npm: `npm i -g @openai/codex`

[Learn more](https://github.com/openai/codex)

### gemini

Google's Gemini CLI coding agent.

Unlocks:

- Run Gemini agents (interactive)

**Install (macOS):**

- Homebrew: `brew install gemini-cli`
- npm: `npm i -g @google/gemini-cli`

**Install (Linux / WSL2):**

- npm: `npm i -g @google/gemini-cli`

[Learn more](https://github.com/google-gemini/gemini-cli)

### opencode

The opencode terminal coding agent.

Unlocks:

- Run OpenCode agents (interactive and one-shot)

**Install (macOS):**

- Homebrew: `brew install opencode`
- npm: `npm i -g opencode-ai`

**Install (Linux / WSL2):**

- npm: `npm i -g opencode-ai`

[Learn more](https://github.com/sst/opencode)

## Version control

Back workspaces with a VCS.

### git

Git version control.

Unlocks:

- Git workspaces and worktrees

**Install (macOS):**

- Homebrew: `brew install git`

**Install (Linux / WSL2):**

- apt: `sudo apt install git`

[Learn more](https://git-scm.com)

### sapling

Sapling source control.

Unlocks:

- Sapling-backed workspaces

**Install (macOS):**

- Homebrew: `brew install sapling`

**Install (Linux / WSL2):**

- Instructions: https://sapling-scm.com/docs/introduction/installation

[Learn more](https://sapling-scm.com)

## Terminal

Run agent sessions.

### tmux

Terminal multiplexer schmux runs sessions in.

Unlocks:

- Spawning any session

**Install (macOS):**

- Homebrew: `brew install tmux`

**Install (Linux / WSL2):**

- apt: `sudo apt install tmux`

[Learn more](https://github.com/tmux/tmux/wiki)

## Sandbox

Restrict what agent commands can touch.

### fence

Lightweight, container-free sandbox for running commands with network and filesystem restrictions.

Unlocks:

- Run agent commands in a container-free sandbox with network and filesystem restrictions

**Install (macOS):**

- Install script: `curl -fsSL https://cli.fencesandbox.com/install.sh | sh`
- Homebrew: `brew tap fencesandbox/tap && brew install fencesandbox/tap/fence`

**Install (Linux / WSL2):**

- Install script: `curl -fsSL https://cli.fencesandbox.com/install.sh | sh`

[Learn more](https://github.com/fencesandbox/fence)

## Editor integrations

Open workspaces in your tools.

### VS Code

Visual Studio Code editor.

Unlocks:

- Open workspaces in VS Code
- VS Code remote server / tunnel

**Install (macOS):**

- Download: https://code.visualstudio.com/download

**Install (Linux / WSL2):**

- Download: https://code.visualstudio.com/download

[Learn more](https://code.visualstudio.com)

### iTerm2

iTerm2 terminal emulator (macOS).

Unlocks:

- Open sessions in iTerm2

**Install (macOS):**

- Download: https://iterm2.com/downloads.html
- Homebrew: `brew install --cask iterm2`

[Learn more](https://iterm2.com)
